item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Good morning!
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Hope you like it, because this is what you're getting.
item.description: This is some cosplayer whose name i can't remember that I got the images from off another social media account about cosplaying that I also can't remember. I don't have a source. I don't have a name for this. And frankly, I sorta don't care right now. To be a little blunt with yall, I'm starting to burn out on the entire Imgur experience. The website is fine. The staff is awesome. The service is great for what it needs to be. The app is managable. Even the corporate overlords are semi toleranable. What's burning me out is some of the users here who are never satisfied with what folks like me have been posting on here for years, and I do mean years. I tend to stay quiet, but I read 99.9% of the comments on everything that I post throughout the day. Most of you are wonderful, clever people who make this community fun. The others - those others. Those frumpy, cynical, "I'm sad so everyone should be sad," others have got me looking for a new community.
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.dc:creator: JarJarDrinks

item.title: One less thing to worry about
item.description:
I re-recorded my voicemail greeting on my phone and when listened to it i didnt recognize the voice. That sounds silly i guess but what i hear in my head when i talk is not what others hear. Im ecstatic. I can stop being self conscious about it. I have been working on it for almost 3 years now and its really working well. its natural to use it now, its not something i have to work at or really think about and its very affirming. i had 45 years of dude voice to train out so i think i have done well even if the progress was slow. Anyway, just wanted to share something positive.
dog tax.
item.dc:creator: Stressicca

item.title: ADOBE Alternatives
item.description: Adobe Alternatives Edit: Why is it when I'm not trying to hit the front page? I hit the front page? I just wanted to post something to redit for a guy who was looking for some alternatives. Anyways, it's my cake day. So thanks!
item.dc:creator: evilgenius007

item.title: Warren Buffett, "I could end the deficit in 5 minutes," he told CNBC. "You just pass a law that says that anytime there is a deficit of more than 3% of GDP, all sitting members of Congress are ineligible for re-election.“Thoughts?
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: CECOT - Imprison Immigrants - 4/14/25 -
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=axBPZh0FQlQ Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele is meeting with President Donald Trump at the White House on Monday, part of a growing alliance between the two right-wing leaders. In recent months, El Salvador has imprisoned hundreds of people for the Trump administration who were expelled from the United States with little or no due process, ending up in the brutal mega-prison known as CECOT.
One of those men is Maryland resident Kilmar Abrego Garcia, whom the Trump administration deported despite a protective order meant to prevent his removal from the country. The Trump administration has so far refused to bring Abrego Garcia back, despite a unanimous Supreme Court ruling ordering the government to "facilitate" his return.
Bukele, who has described himself as "the world's coolest dictator," has ruled for years under a state of emergency in El Salvador, imprisoning tens of thousands of people without trial as part of a supposed war on gangs. "Never did I imagine that we would be in a situation where the Trump administration, the United States, is looking to El Salvador, to the Bukele administration, saying, 'Huh, we kind of like what you are doing,'" says Pulitzer Prize-winning journalist Maria Hinojosa, who just returned from a reporting trip to El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: America take note!!! Well done to this library!!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Returning stolen memes dump part 1
item.description:
This is my first phoneclearing dump. I have way too many memes I like. Please comment if I should do something different and depending on my mood I might listen. Hope you enjoy it!
Cattax! He looks super uncomfortable but he likes to lie down like this. Edit: my 1st post, and my first front page post! Send nudes I guess? I wanna add that I hoped I made someone laugh in these dire times and I will add more dumps. Someone told me a while ago that I never contributed on Imgur and while their tone was awful, they was right tho. So here's me returning what I like about Imgur. Memes.
item.dc:creator: NeedToMakeAPoint

item.title: Never Forget The Greatest Retraction Ever
item.description:
Despite the September 9, 1997 date in the header, this issue actually hit newstands on August 31, 1997 (it's a common practice to postdate periodicals).
Another exciting thing that happened that day is that Lady Di was killed in a violent car crash
Leading to the greatest print retraction of our lifetimes
Bonus Points: the shameless "The Crash - what *really* happened" article. She was fleeing from the paparazzi you bloodsucking soulless cunts.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Bottom shelf memes I found in the juggler's dream catcher.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Do you love memes but hate ads? (ง •̀_•́)ง Check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
ᓚᘏᗢ ♡ Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
ᓚᘏᗢ ♡ Potato tax! You can ferd him treats when you catch him love on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
